title: penstemon dugesii
intro: Penstemon dugesii, also known as Dugès' beardtongue, is a species of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, known for its tubular flowers that range in color from blue to purple. The medicinal properties of Penstemon dugesii include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, soothing respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system.
